title: Sitemap XML, Index Traversal, Location Rules, and Admission
description: A sitemap parser accepts unlimited nested indexes, non-UTF-8 surprises, foreign hosts, duplicate URLs, invalid escaping, and freshness hints as commands. Learners cumulatively produce bounded sitemap discovery ledger through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Validate sitemap and sitemap-index namespaces, UTF-8 XML, escaping, location count, size, and required loc values.
Bound index depth, files, URLs, bytes, redirects, duplicate entries, duration, and cycles before traversal.
Resolve and admit sitemap and page locations through authorization, origin, robots, URL, and SSRF policy.
